title: Fix OPFSBackend stat() directory detection
description: ARCH gap: OPFSBackend.stat() always returns isDirectory: false. Implement proper directory detection using OPFS FileSystemDirectoryHandle API. When stat() is called on a directory path, it should return isDirectory: true with appropriate size (0) and mtime. Match NodeFsBackend behavior. Target: ARCH gap 'OPFSBackend.stat() always returns isDirectory: false — cannot detect directories, inconsistent with NodeFsBackend'.
